chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْحُبِّ فِي اللَّهِ وَ الْبُغْضِ فِي اللَّهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – The love regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and the hatred regarding Allah<sup>azwj</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (264/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (264/ 8)
text: إِذَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ تَعْلَمَ أَنَّ فِيكَ خَيْراً فَانْظُرْ إِلَى قَلْبِكَ فَإِنْ كَانَ يُحِبُّ أَهْلَ طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَ يُبْغِضُ أَهْلَ مَعْصِيَتِهِ فَفِيكَ خَيْرٌ وَ اللَّهُ يُحِبُّكَ وَ إِنْ كَانَ يُبْغِضُ أَهْلَ طَاعَةِ اللَّهِ وَ يُحِبُّ أَهْلَ مَعْصِيَتِهِ فَلَيْسَ فِيكَ خَيْرٌ وَ اللَّهُ يُبْغِضُكَ وَ الْمَرْءُ مَعَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Ibn Al Arzamy, from his father, from Jabir Al Ju’fy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> having said: ‘Whenever you intend to know that there is goodness in you, so look at your heart. So if it loves the people obedient to Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and hates the people disobedient to Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, so there is goodness in you and Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Loves you. And if it was so that it hates the people obedient to Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> and loves the people disobedient to Him<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, so there is no goodnes in you and Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Hates you. And the person would be with the one who he loves’.
en.sarwar: 11. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from ibn al-‘Arzami from his father from Jabir al-Juhfi from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “If you like to know whether there is anything good in you, look into your heart. If it loves people who obey Allah and hates those who disobey Him, then there is good in you and Allah loves you. If it hates the people who obey Allah and loves those who disobey Allah, then there is nothing good in you and Allah hates you. A man is with what he loves.”
